He pointed to 178,000 new jobs and a 55% drop in the trade deficit—calling it the largest decrease ever—and credited tariffs for the gains in a post on Truth Social. In a separate post, Trump also criticized The New York Times, accusing…

summaryEn: An A-10 providing close air support for a search and rescue mission for a downed F-15 crew was hit by Iranian fire and crashed in Kuwait after the pilot ejected, ABC News reports, citing a U.S. official.
